We value your privacy

We use cookies to enhance your browsing experience, serve personalized ads or content, and analyze our traffic. By clicking "Accept All", you consent to our use of cookies.

We use cookies to help you navigate efficiently and perform certain functions. You will find detailed information about all cookies under each consent category below.

The cookies that are categorized as "Necessary" are stored on your browser as they are essential for enabling the basic functionalities of the site. ... Show more

For more information on how Google's third-party cookies operate and handle your data, see: [Google Privacy Policy](https://business.safety.google/privacy)

NecessaryAlways Active

Necessary cookies are required to enable the basic features of this site, such as providing secure log-in or adjusting your consent preferences. These cookies do not store any personally identifiable data.

- Cookie

cookieyes-consent

- Duration

1 year

- Description

CookieYes sets this cookie to remember users' consent preferences so that their preferences are respected on subsequent visits to this site. It does not collect or store any personal information about the site visitors.


- Cookie

wordpress\_test\_cookie

- Duration

session

- Description

WordPress sets this cookie to determine whether cookies are enabled on the users' browsers.


- Cookie

wp\_consent\_preferences

- Duration

1 month

- Description

WP Consent API sets this cookie to save users' consent choices for different types of cookies on the website. This ensures a tailored browsing experience by applying users preferences consistently across the visits.


- Cookie

wp\_consent\_statistics

- Duration

1 month

- Description

WP Consent API sets this cookie to collect anonymous data on website usage and help to analyze and enhance the sites' performance.


- Cookie

- Duration

1 month

- Description

WP Consent API sets this cookie to understand how the website is used, which enables enhanced user content and services and respects privacy.


- Cookie

wp\_consent\_functional

- Duration

1 month

- Description

WP Consent API sets this cookie to remember user preferences for essential website functionalities, ensuring a seamless and personalized experience.


- Cookie

wp\_consent\_marketing

- Duration

1 month

- Description

WP Consent API sets this cookie to record user consent choices for marketing cookies. This ensures that users only receive advertisements tailored to their interests.


- Cookie

\_cfuvid

- Duration

session

- Description

Calendly sets this cookie to track users across sessions to optimize user experience by maintaining session consistency and providing personalized services


- Cookie

wpEmojiSettingsSupports

- Duration

session

- Description

WordPress sets this cookie when a user interacts with emojis on a WordPress site. It helps determine if the user's browser can display emojis properly.


Functional

Functional cookies help perform certain functionalities like sharing the content of the website on social media platforms, collecting feedback, and other third-party features.

- Cookie

\_icl\_current\_language

- Duration

1 day

- Description

This cookie is stored by WPML WordPress plugin. The purpose of the cookie is to store the current language.


- Cookie

- Duration

session

- Description

WordPress multilingual plugin sets this cookie to store the current language/language settings.


- Cookie

ytidb::LAST\_RESULT\_ENTRY\_KEY

- Duration

Never Expires

- Description

The cookie ytidb::LAST\_RESULT\_ENTRY\_KEY is used by YouTube to store the last search result entry that was clicked by the user. This information is used to improve the user experience by providing more relevant search results in the future.


- Cookie

sc\_anonymous\_id

- Duration

Never Expires

- Description

Soundcloud sets this cookie to enable visitors to embed content or files on the website.


Analytics

Analytical cookies are used to understand how visitors interact with the website. These cookies help provide information on metrics such as the number of visitors, bounce rate, traffic source, etc.

- Cookie

\_ga\_\*

- Duration

1 year 1 month 4 days

- Description

Google Analytics sets this cookie to store and count page views.


- Cookie

\_ga

- Duration

1 year 1 month 4 days

- Description

Google Analytics sets this cookie to calculate visitor, session and campaign data and track site usage for the site's analytics report. The cookie stores information anonymously and assigns a randomly generated number to recognise unique visitors.


- Cookie

3 months

- Description

# ITALIAN RESTAURANT MISSISSAUGA

Discover the **Pacini italian restaurant in Mississauga** and let our authentic Italian cuisine charm you on each of your visits!

#### DINING ROOM MENUS

[Presto Lunch Special](https://menus.pacini.com/en/presto-lunch-special-on-en/)

[Aperitivo](https://menus.pacini.com/en/menu-aperitivo-on-en/)

[À la carte](https://menus.pacini.com/en/a-la-carte-menu-on-en/)

[Dessert](https://menus.pacini.com/en/dessert-menu-on-en/)

[Children’s menu](https://menus.pacini.com/en/childrens-menu)

[Beverages and Cocktails](https://menus.pacini.com/en/menu-beverages-and-cocktails-on-en/)

[Spritz Moments](https://menus.pacini.com/en/menu-spritz-moments-on-en)

[Wine List](https://menus.pacini.com/en/wine-menu-on-en/)

#### RESERVATION

905 488-5403

[Online reservation](https://www.opentable.ca/r/pacini-mississauga-reservations-mississauga?restref=1271980&lang=en-CA&ot_source=Restaurant%20website)

#### OPENING HOURS

|     |     |     |     |
| --- | --- | --- | --- |
| Sunday | 11:30 am | to | 10 pm |
| Monday | 11:30 am | to | 10 pm |
| Tuesday | 11:30 am | to | 10 pm |
| Wednesday | 11:30 am | to | 10 pm |
| Thursday | 11:30 am | to | 10 pm |
| Friday | 11:30 am | to | 11 pm |
| Saturday | 11:30 am | to | 11 pm |

#### TAKE-OUT

[paciniacasa.com](https://acasa.order-online.ai/en/#/?service=takeout&restocode=Mississauga)

#### AMENITIES

– Takeout menu

– Italian market

– WiFi

– Private multimedia reception room (up to 14 guests)

– Bar/Lounge

– Mezzanine

– Free outdoor parking

– Terrace

– Wheelchair accessible

## MENU

# Inquire about our Fresh Daily Features

Specials

###### ANTIPASTI-ZUPPE-INSALATE

BRUSCHETTA

Crostini, Marinated Tomatoes, Onions, Garlic

$7.99

CALAMARI ALLA GRIGLIA

Roasted Red Peppers

$19.99

Calabrese Toastini Spread with Citrus Ricotta, Sautéed Mushrooms, Tomato Jam

$14.99

RAPINI E FAGIOLI PERLE DI CAMPO

Steamed Rapini, Navy Beans, EVOO, Lemon, Garlic

$13.99

POLPETTE DI CINGHIALE

San Marzano Tomato Broth

$17.99

Marinara Sauce

$16.99

GAMBERI DIAVOLA

Tiger Shrimps, Spicy Tomato Sauce

$19.99

Sun-dried Tomatoes, Olives, Artisan Cheese,

Balsamic Crostini

$24.99

ARTICHOKE ARANCINI

Breaded Artichoke Risotto with Basil Tomato Sauce

$15.99

ZUPPA DEL GIORNO

Soup of the day prepared daily

$9.99

Medley of Mixed Greens, Julienne Vegetables,

House Balsamic Vinaigrette

$9.99

Traditional Caesar Salad, Toasted Garlic Croutons, Parmigiano Reggiano

$14.99

INSALATA CAPRESE

Grilled Onion, Basil Pesto Dressing

$17.99

INSALATA ARUGULA

Organic Arugula, Frisée, Pecans,

Crumbled Goat Cheese, Julienne of Apple,

Honey Mustard Vinaigrette

$15.99

###### PASTA-CARNE-PESCE

CAPELLI D’ANGELI

Angel Hair Pasta, Lobster Meat,

Tomato Cream Sauce

$39.99

PENNE TRASTEVERINA

# Penne, Bacon, Chicken, Vodka Rosé Sauce

# $24.99

LINGUINE FRUTTI DI MARE

Linguine, Mussels, Clams, Shrimp and Scallops,

White Wine, Tomato Sauce

$30.99

GNOCCHI NAPOLITANA

Homemade Potato Dumplings, Fresh Basil,

Shaved Parmigiano Reggiano, Tomato Sauce

$24.99

ORECCHIETTE

Nonna’s Pasta, Sausage, Rapini,

Caramelized Onions, Roasted Garlic Brodo

$25.99

AGNOLOTTI

Ricotta and Spinach filled Pasta, Mascarpone Cream, Aromatic Pangratatto

$26.99

VITELLO AL LIMONE

Veal Scaloppine with a White Wine,

Lemon Butter Sauce

$28.99

VITELLO SORRENTINA

Veal Scaloppine topped with Eggplant, Capicola, Mozzarella, Basil Tomato Sauce

$30.99

FILETTO DI VITELLO

Pan-Seared Veal Tenderloin, Mushrooms,

Caramelized Onions, Red Wine Demi

$41.99

AGNELLO

Roast Marinated Rack of Lamb,

Red Wine Reduction

$60.99

BISTECCA ALLA GRIGLIA

Grilled 10oz AAA NY Strip Loin,

Cognac Peppercorn Sauce

$43.99

CIOPPINO DI PESCE

Shrimp, Calamari, Mussels, Clams, Prime Cod,

1/2 Lobster Tail, Garlic White Wine Tomato Broth

$43.99

Dessert

POLLO

Roast Chicken Supreme, stuffed with Mushrooms, Tarragon Cream Sauce

$29.99

FEGATO

Provimi Calves Liver, Sautéed Onions,

Red Wine Sauce

$25.99

SALMONE

Blackened Fresh Atlantic Salmon,

Apple Slaw, Maple Glaze

$29.99

BRANZINO

Seared European Bass with Olives,

Tomato Salsa, Lemon Olive Oil

$36.99

\*An additional charge will be applied to vegetables/potatoes substituted with side pasta.

###### DESSERT

DELIZIA AL CARAMELLO

Creme Caramel

$8.95

SEMIFREDDO

Homemade ice cream in a chocolate cup with caramel and a wild berry coulis

$8.95

B-52 CHEESECAKE

$10.95

TOBLERONE CHOCOLATE MOUSSE CAKE

A trio of white, milk, and bittersweet chocolate mousse, finished with a dark chocolate coating

$10.95

SORBETO AL LIMONE

A delightfully refreshing lemon sorbet

$8.95

TIRAMISU

A classic layered, mascarpone cream, espresso soaked savoiardi, sweet marsala

$11.95

STICKY TOFFEE PUDDING

A rich date pudding cake drizzled with caramel

$9.95

MORE DI STAGIONE

$10.95

Selection of 5 Cheese $28.95

web.title: Food Menu - Alioli Ristorante
web.description: Our Menu · Sharing Plates · Bread & Olives · Soup & Salad · Appetizers · Vegetarian Starters · Seafood Pasta · Pasta · Pasta Vegetariana ...
web.markdown:
# Our Menu

- [Lunch/Dinner Menu](https://alioli.com/666414)
- [Corporate & Private Party Menu](https://alioli.com/3)
- [Special Event Menu](https://alioli.com/2)

- [Cocktail Party Menu](https://alioli.com/666448)
- [Catering Menu](https://alioli.com/666446)

There will be times when the quality of ingredients does not meet our standards and certain menu items will not be served. Please advise your server of any allergies or dietary restrictions. Special occasion cake service charges $4 per person. An 18% gratuity may be added to any group of six or more. A 20% gratuity may be added on separate tabs. Catering and private functions are available or join us for one of our exclusive wine tastings

## Sharing Plates

### Charcuterie Board

$42.00/+

Prosciutto di parma, soppressata salami, capocollo & artisanal cheeses \| serves 2 – $42 \| serves 3 – $60 \| serves 4 – $79

### Seafood Board

$57.00/+

Grilled calamari, cajun-spiced shrimp, crab cakes & pan-seared sea scallops \| serves 2 – $58 \| serves 3 – $86 \| serves 4 – $112

## Bread & Olives

![](https://static.spotapps.co/spots/0f/323e6f89d04371adb70a7cd3ef03a4/full)

### Focaccia

$7.00

Fresh-baked focaccia bread brushed with rosemary extra virgin olive oil

### Marinated Olives

$15.00

Marinated mixed olives, served warm

## Soup & Salad

Add to any salad: Add grilled chicken breast $18 \| Add grilled tiger shrimp (6) $18 \| Add grilled veal scaloppini $8

### Zuppa del Giorno

$15.00

Our chef’s soup of the day

### Insalata Cesare

$18.00

Romaine hearts, Parmigiano, garlic croutons, our signature Caesar dressing, topped with crispy prosciutto (Italian ham)

### Insalata Alioli

$19.00

Baby kale, radicchio, romaine, beets, candied pecan, shaved carrot, shaved parmigiano tossed in sherry vinaigrette

![](https://static.spotapps.co/web/placeholder.png)

### Insalata Caprese

$23.00

Imported buffalo mozzarella, vine-ripened tomatoes, marinated olives, fresh basil, balsamic reduction

## Appetizers

Add to any appetizer: Add grilled chicken breast $18 \| Add grilled tiger shrimp (6) $18 \| Add grilled veal scaloppini $8

### Polpette di Cinghiale

$23.00

Braised wild boar (pork) meatballs, house-made fresh tomato sauce, shaved parmigiano

### Crochette di Granchio

$26.00
